content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Fixed the remaining `ralph-burning-rlm.5` regressions by making daemon multi-repo cleanup remove `run.pid` from the checkout root instead of the per-repo daemon state dir, teaching stale-running CLI recovery to surface detached daemon lease owners even when `run.pid` and the writer lock are already gone, and making multi-repo Phase 0 treat only truly missing worktree leases as orphaned while quarantining corrupt/wrong-type lease records. Added regression coverage for checkout-root pid cleanup, orphaned pid cleanup repair, corrupt terminal lease quarantine across cycles, and detached-owner fallback during stale-running recovery.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspected the pending daemon/CLI recovery paths to confirm the three remaining gaps: multi-repo pid cleanup was resolving against daemon state instead of the checkout, stale-running recovery still ignored detached daemon owners, and Phase 0 was clearing task lease metadata on any `read_lease()` failure instead of quarantining corrupt lease records.
2. [Completed] Patched `src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs` to remove owned pid files via the repo checkout root, thread the repo root through orphaned lease cleanup, and fail closed on corrupt/wrong-type terminal lease records while still repairing genuinely missing orphaned leases; patched `src/cli/run.rs` so stale-running owner detection falls back to detached daemon lease discovery.
3. [Completed] Added focused regressions for multi-repo checkout-root pid cleanup, multi-repo orphaned pid cleanup repair, corrupt terminal lease quarantine, and stale-running detached-owner discovery, then ran the repository validation suite.

## Validation Evidence

- Targeted regression passed: `cargo test --features test-stub process_cycle_multi_repo_removes_run_pid_from_checkout_root_on_completion`.
- Targeted regression passed: `cargo test --features test-stub process_cycle_multi_repo_repairs_orphaned_lease_reference_after_metadata_failure`.
- Targeted regression passed: `cargo test --features test-stub process_cycle_multi_repo_quarantines_corrupt_terminal_lease_records`.
- Targeted regression passed: `cargo test observed_running_attempt_owner_falls_back_to_detached_owner_without_pid_or_lock`.
- `cargo test` passed.
- `cargo clippy` passed with only pre-existing unrelated warnings.
- `cargo fmt --check` passed.
- `br lint --json` was run and reports only the pre-existing unrelated bead template warnings listed above.

## Outstanding Risks

- `cargo clippy` still reports pre-existing repository warnings unrelated to this change.
- `br lint --json` still reports unrelated pre-existing bead template warnings on `ralph-burning-rlm.1`, `ralph-burning-rlm.2`, `ralph-burning-rlm.3`, `ralph-burning-utm`, `ralph-burning-kvc`, `ralph-burning-gsp`, `ralph-burning-p2h`, `ralph-burning-fyj`, and `ralph-burning-hg4`.
